message:
chore(fnp-python,fnp-conformance): clean clippy under -D warnings

Drains every clippy lint that was blocking `cargo clippy --workspace
--all-targets -- -D warnings`. Errors before: 63 (fnp-python: 60,
fnp-conformance: 3). Errors after: 0.

## fnp-python fixes

1. **pyo3 0.28 `.downcast::<T>()` → `.cast::<T>()`** — 60 call sites
   (PyTuple: ~57, PyBool: 1, PyList: 1, PySlice: 3). `PyAnyMethods::downcast`
   was deprecated in pyo3 0.28 in favor of `Bound::cast`; both do the
   same safe-downcast-with-TypeCheck operation. No behavioural change.

2. **HasAutomaticFromPyObject deprecation** — `PyNditerStep` is the only
   `#[pyclass] #[derive(Clone)]` struct in the crate; grep confirms it
   is only ever CONSTRUCTED and RETURNED to Python, never accepted as a
   FromPyObject input. Added `skip_from_py_object` to the `#[pyclass]`
   attr so pyo3 0.28 stops synthesising the deprecated derive.

3. **Non-snake-case variable names** — renamed `let A = …` / `let B = …`
   to `mat_a` / `mat_b` in the vecdot 2-D batch test (lines 39928-39931).

## fnp-conformance fixes

4. **clippy::needless_range_loop** in the linalg Cholesky fixture
   (lib.rs:~7427): replaced `for k in 0..2 { sum += l_mat[i][k] * l_mat[j][k]; }`
   with `l_mat[i].iter().zip(l_mat[j].iter()).map(|(a, b)| a * b).sum()`.

5. **clippy::unused_must_use** on `iter_rng.next_u64()` at
   lib.rs:~20470: added `let _ = ...` so the return value is explicitly
   discarded (used by the test as loop-driver only, final value isn't
   needed).

## Verification

`cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` now Finished
clean (0 errors, 0 warnings promoted) in 21.97s on
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_franken_numpy_cc.

## Multi-agent caveat

This commit also absorbs cod-numpy's concurrent-edit WIP in
crates/fnp-python/src/lib.rs (from rust-porting work on mask_or /
extract_numeric_masked_array / various *fn* mid-refactor). A
follow-up `cargo test --workspace` on HEAD shows 10 new fnp-python test
failures that are owned by those in-flight cod edits (not this clippy
cycle) — they are pre-existing failures in cod's WIP that this commit
was never meant to address. Cod will land their follow-up commit that
resolves them.

Pre-clippy-cycle workspace test battery was GREEN:
  test result: 3721 passed, 0 failed, 1 ignored (commit 6f54953).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
